units.source_text: 1 Unallocated impairment losses in relation to disposal groups of $0.09bn (2024: $0.03bn) and non-financial assets of $0.26bn (2024: $0.92bn) that are presented
units.translation_target_text: 1 与处置组相关的未分配减值损失为 0.9 亿美元（2024 年：0.3 亿美元）和非金融资产 2.6 亿美元（2024 年：9.2 亿美元）
